zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger Consul Of Milan於1100年出生在義大利隆巴迪亞米蘭諾米蘭諾時，他的父親Guidone Visconti Feudatario di Massino, Albezzate e Besnate20歲，母親Garizia of Italy20歲。他和Garizia Geneve至少有2個兒子。他於1189年被列為podesta of bergamo。他去世於1189年2月9日在義大利隆巴迪亞米蘭諾享年89歲。

nameMeanings.name: Of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Cheng, Jing, Kam Fung, Wai Shing, Wing, Yali, Yuk.
Chinese:
variant Romanization of the surnames 歐 and 區, see   Ou   1 and 2.

variants.name: Ou
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Ying, Ching, Heng, Hong, Jia, Kuang Yu, Li-Ching, Cho, Chong, Chung, Sa.  Southeast Asian Lichun, Ming, Quan, Roeun, Sokhom, Chau, Hai, Leang, Ly, Nhanh, Phan, Pho, Tha.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 歐, meaning ‘to sing someone's praise’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the placename Dong Ou (東甌), a fief (in present-day Wenzhou in Zhejiang province) which was granted to Yao in 192  BC . It is said that Yao was a descendant of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (ii) from the placename Ou Yu (歐餘), the name of a fief (located in present-day Zhejiang province) that was granted to Ti, the second son of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 區, originally denoting an ancient vessel for measurement in ancient Chinese: from the personal name of Ou Zhizi (歐治子), an expert sword-maker who lived during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ). Some of his descendants inherited Ou (歐) as their surname, simplifying the Chinese character 歐 to 區.

nameMeanings.name: Milan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Francisco, Jose, Carlos, Juan, Modesto, Nestor, Alfonso, Angel, Jesus, Joaquin, Jorge, Miguel.
Spanish (Milán) and French: nickname from the bird's name milán, milan ‘kite’, possibly denoting an avid person.
Spanish (Milán) and French: habitational name from the Italian city of Milan (see Milano ).

variants.name: Milanowski
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Jerzy, Ryszard, Wencel, Krystyna, Marzanna, Stanislaw.
Polish: habitational name for someone from a place called Milanowo, Milanów, or Milanówek, all named with the personal name Milan or with a derivative of the adjective miły ‘pleasant, favorable’.

variants.name: Milanovic
meanings: Serbian and Croatian (Milanović): patronymic from the personal name Milan .

variants.name: Melahn
meanings: German (of Slavic origin): from a Germanized form of the Slavic personal name   Milan  .

variants.name: Miland
meanings: Norwegian: habitational name from Miland, a farm name in Telemark, a compound of Old Norse míthr ‘middle’ and land ‘land, farmstead’, denoting a farm in the middle.
Altered form of German Mieland (or of some other like-sounding surname): derivative of any of several German or Slavic personal names, for example Slavic Miloslav (see Milan 3).
English (Hampshire and Norfolk): variant of Myland, a habitational name from Milland in Trotton (Sussex). The placename probably derives from Old English myln ‘mill’ + land ‘land’.

variants.name: Milano
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Angelo, Vito, Antonio, Carmelo, Ciro, Domenic, Francesca, Luigi, Matteo, Pasquale, Rocco.

Italian and Jewish (from Italy): habitational name from Milan (Italian Milano, from Latin Mediolan(i)um, composed of Celtic elements meaning ‘middle’ + ‘plain’), a city in northern Italy, capital of Lombardy.
In some cases also Spanish: of the same origin as 1 or a habitational name from Milano in Salamanca province.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger Consul Of Milan was born in 1100, in Milano, Milan, Lombardy, Italy, his father, Guidone Visconti Feudatario di Massino, Albezzate e Besnate, was 20 and his mother, Garizia of Italy, was 20. He had at least 2 sons with Garizia Geneve. In 1189, at the age of 89, his occupation is listed as podesta of bergamo. He died on 9 February 1189, in Milan, Lombardy, Italy, at the age of 89.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger Consul Of Milan est né en 1100, à Milano, Milano, Lombardia, Italie, son père, Guidone Visconti Feudatario di Massino, Albezzate e Besnate, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Garizia of Italy, avait 20 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils avec Garizia Geneve. En 1189, à l’âge de 89 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est podesta of bergamo. Il est décédé le 9 février 1189, à Milano, Lombardia, Italie, à l’âge de 89 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger Consul Of Milan 1100 in Milano, Milano, Lombardei, Italien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guidone Visconti Feudatario di Massino, Albezzate e Besnate 20 und seine Mutter Garizia of Italy 20. Er hatte mit Garizia Geneve mindestens 2 Söhne. 1189, als er 89 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als podesta of bergamo aufgeführt. Er starb am 9. Februar 1189 im Alter von 89 Jahren in Milano, Lombardei, Italien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Consul Of Milan è nato il nel 1100 nel Milano, Milano, Lombardia, Italia, il suo padre, Guidone Visconti Feudatario di Massino, Albezzate e Besnate, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Garizia of Italy, aveva 20 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli con Garizia Geneve. Nel 1189, all'età di 89 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come podesta of bergamo. Morì il 9 febbraio 1189, nel Milano, Lombardia, Italia, all'età di 89 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger Consul Of Milanが1100年にイタリアロンバーディアミラノミラノで生まれた時，父Guidone Visconti Feudatario di Massino, Albezzate e Besnateは20歳，母Garizia of Italyは20歳であった。彼はGarizia Geneveとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。1189年，89歳の時，職業はpodesta of bergamoと記録されている。彼は1189年2月9日にイタリアロンバーディアミラノで89歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger Consul Of Milan(이)가 1100년 이탈리아 롬바디아 미랜오 미랜오에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guidone Visconti Feudatario di Massino, Albezzate e Besnate(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Garizia of Italy(은)는 20세였다. 그는 Garizia Geneve(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 1189년, 89세의 나이로 그의 직업은 podesta of bergamo이었다. 그는 1189년 2월 9일 이탈리아 롬바디아 미랜오에서 89세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Consul Of Milan nasceu em 1100, em Milano, Milano, Lombardia, Itália, seu pai, Guidone Visconti Feudatario di Massino, Albezzate e Besnate, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Garizia of Italy, tinha 20 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos com Garizia Geneve. Em 1189, com 89 anos, sua profissão aparece como podesta of bergamo. Ele faleceu em 9 de fevereiro de 1189, em Milano, Lombardia, Itália, com 89 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger Consul Of Milan родился в 1100 г. в местности милано, милано, ломбардя, Италия, его отцу по имени Guidone Visconti Feudatario di Massino, Albezzate e Besnate было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Garizia of Italy, 20. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына от Garizia Geneve. В 1189 году, в возрасте 89 лет,  он работал по профессии podesta of bergamo. Он умер 9 февраля 1189 г. в местности милано, ломбардя, Италия в возрасте 89 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger Consul Of Milan nació en 1100, en Milano, Milano, Lombardia, Italia, su papá, Guidone Visconti Feudatario di Massino, Albezzate e Besnate, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Garizia of Italy, tenía 20 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos con Garizia Geneve. En 1189, a la edad de 89 años, su ocupación registrada era podesta of bergamo. Murió el 9 de febrero de 1189, en Milano, Lombardia, Italia, a la edad de 89 años.
